subcodes.first_line: O tried believer! Praise be to God that the melody of the Supreme Concourse hath reached thy listening ear; thou hast awakened and become attentive [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن ممتحن الحمد لله که آهنگ ملا اعلی بگوش هوش رسید بیدار شدی شنوا گردیدی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @poems and quotation from poetry, @thankfulness; gratitude
